windows.command: $prjPath='Quartz.Presentation/Quartz.Presentation.csproj'; $prjName='Quartz.Presentation'; $tfm='net10.0'; $cfg='Release'; $rids='win-x86','win-x64','win-arm64','osx-x64','osx-arm64','linux-x64','linux-arm','linux-arm64'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path publish | Out-Null; $fail=@(); foreach ($rid in $rids) { Write-Host "Publishing $prjName for RuntimeIdentifier=$rid"; $tmp=Join-Path ([System.IO.Path]::GetTempPath()) "qrz-$([System.Guid]::NewGuid())"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $tmp | Out-Null; $ext=if ($rid -like 'win-*') {'.exe'} else {''}; dotnet publish $prjPath -c $cfg -f $tfm -r $rid --self-contained true -p:PublishSingleFile=true -p:PublishTrimmed=true -o $tmp *> "$tmp\publish.log"; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0 -and (Test-Path "$tmp\$prjName$ext")) { Move-Item "$tmp\$prjName$ext" "publish\$rid$ext" -Force; Write-Host '  -> OK' } else { Move-Item "$tmp\publish.log" "publish\$rid.log" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host '  -> FAILED'; $fail+=$rid }; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $tmp -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; if ($fail.Count -eq 0) { Write-Host 'Publish finished successfully. All artifacts are strictly in publish/'; exit 0 }; Write-Host "Publish finished with failures: $($fail -join ', ')"; exit 0

linux.command: set -uo pipefail; prjPath='Quartz.Presentation/Quartz.Presentation.csproj'; prjName='Quartz.Presentation'; tfm='net10.0'; cfg='Release'; rids=(win-x86 win-x64 win-arm64 osx-x64 osx-arm64 linux-x64 linux-arm linux-arm64); mkdir -p publish; fail=(); for rid in "${rids[@]}"; do echo "Publishing $prjName for RuntimeIdentifier=$rid"; tmp=$(mktemp -d); ext=''; [[ "$rid" == win-* ]] && ext='.exe'; if dotnet publish "$prjPath" -c "$cfg" -f "$tfm" -r "$rid" --self-contained true -p:PublishSingleFile=true -p:PublishTrimmed=true -o "$tmp" > "$tmp/publish.log" 2>&1 && [ -f "$tmp/$prjName$ext" ]; then mv "$tmp/$prjName$ext" "publish/$rid$ext"; echo '  -> OK'; else mv "$tmp/publish.log" "publish/$rid.log"; echo '  -> FAILED'; fail+=("$rid"); fi; rm -rf "$tmp"; done; if [ ${#fail[@]} -eq 0 ]; then echo 'Publish finished successfully. All artifacts are strictly in publish/'; exit 0; fi; echo "Publish finished with failures: ${fail[*]}"; exit 0

osx.command: set -uo pipefail; prjPath='Quartz.Presentation/Quartz.Presentation.csproj'; prjName='Quartz.Presentation'; tfm='net10.0'; cfg='Release'; rids=(win-x86 win-x64 win-arm64 osx-x64 osx-arm64 linux-x64 linux-arm linux-arm64); mkdir -p publish; fail=(); for rid in "${rids[@]}"; do echo "Publishing $prjName for RuntimeIdentifier=$rid"; tmp=$(mktemp -d); ext=''; [[ "$rid" == win-* ]] && ext='.exe'; if dotnet publish "$prjPath" -c "$cfg" -f "$tfm" -r "$rid" --self-contained true -p:PublishSingleFile=true -p:PublishTrimmed=true -o "$tmp" > "$tmp/publish.log" 2>&1 && [ -f "$tmp/$prjName$ext" ]; then mv "$tmp/$prjName$ext" "publish/$rid$ext"; echo '  -> OK'; else mv "$tmp/publish.log" "publish/$rid.log"; echo '  -> FAILED'; fail+=("$rid"); fi; rm -rf "$tmp"; done; if [ ${#fail[@]} -eq 0 ]; then echo 'Publish finished successfully. All artifacts are strictly in publish/'; exit 0; fi; echo "Publish finished with failures: ${fail[*]}"; exit 0
